_meta.note: Single source of truth. Generate tokens.css (web) and constants.ts (RN) from this file via Style Dictionary. Do NOT edit tokens.css manually.

accent.comment: CTA primary — rose-terracotta. Warm enough to invite action, not aggressive enough to feel discount-y. Replaces cold neon pink #ff3d77. WCAG AA on --card (#1e1a22): 5.2:1.

accent2.comment: CTA secondary / tags / badges — warm terracotta-amber. Mediterranean warmth. Anchors the palette in earthiness. Replaces cold purple #7b5cff. WCAG AA on --bg: 4.6:1.

accent3.comment: Tertiary accent — muted indigo. Used sparingly for notification dots, special states. Cooler complement to the warm primaries. Replaces cyan #06b6d4.

bg.comment: Base background. Near-black with a warm purple undertone — avoids the harshness of pure black (#000) or cold blue-black (#0a0a0e). Photo content pops without eye strain. References: Spotify #121212, Twitter dark #15202B — ours is warmer.

surface.comment: Second layer — modals, bottom sheets, side panels. Clearly elevated from --bg (7 lightness steps) without being jarring. Replaces #13131f which was too close to --bg (only 4 steps delta).

card.comment: Card backgrounds — feed items, product tiles, profile sections. Warm purple-charcoal. The warmth makes product photography feel framed, not floating on cold metal. Replaces #17171f. DESIGN_STANDARDS.md migration target for #2a2040 and #1a1030.

card-hover.comment: Card hover/pressed state. Derived from --card with +8 lightness. Warm purple tint. Was previously #1f1f38 — a hallucinated blue-purple outside the system.

line.comment: Borders, dividers, separators. Warm purple-gray. Enough contrast for structure without drawing the eye. Replaces #24242e.

fg.comment: Primary text. Slightly warm white — the faint lavender tint prevents the harsh blue-white fatigue of pure #fff. Contrast on --bg: 16.8:1 (WCAG AAA). Replaces cold #f6f6f9.

muted.comment: Secondary text, captions, timestamps. Warm gray-purple. Contrast on --card: 4.6:1 (WCAG AA). Replaces #8e8e9c.

success.comment: Success states — order confirmed, upload done, follow accepted. Slightly warmer than pure Tailwind green #4ade80. Avoids the 'hospital green' association.

warning.comment: Warning states — out of stock, pending, approaching limit. Warm amber, not harsh yellow. Replaces #fbbf24 which reads as 'caution tape' on dark backgrounds.

danger.comment: Error / destructive states — delete, block, payment failure. Muted red, not alarm-red. Avoids the panic feel of pure #ef4444. Contrast on --card: 4.8:1 (WCAG AA).

overlay.comment: Modal scrim / backdrop. Uses --bg RGB values so the overlay is tonally consistent with the app, not a generic black wash. 80% opacity (was 72%) for stronger content isolation.

primary.comment: Primary gradient — rose to terracotta. Used for hero CTAs, cover photos, profile bio backgrounds. Warm Mediterranean sunset. Replaces cold pink→purple #ff3d77→#7b5cff.

secondary.comment: Secondary gradient — terracotta to indigo. Used for secondary highlights, tag groups. Bridges warm and cool accents.

success.comment: Success gradient — emerald to teal. Used for achievement badges, completion states.

shine.comment: Subtle card shine overlay — adds depth to cards without opaque color. Rose→terracotta at low opacity.

glow.comment: stronger rose glow for featured elements
